name: Orange Chicken #1
recipeIngredient: 1 1/4 lb Skinned and boned chicken, cut into 1/2-inch pieces
Zest of 1/2 small orange, cut into 2 x 1/8-inch strips and blanched (use lemon zest)
4 Trimmed scallions, 4 inches long for garnish
recipeInstructions:
1. In a glass or stainless-steel bowl, combine chicken, 3 tablespoons of the sherry, and salt. Let stand at room temperature for 30 minutes.
2. Heat oil over medium-high heat in a 9-inch skillet or wok. Add bell pepper, scallions, orange zest, and garlic. Cook, stirring quickly and frequently, until vegetables are tender-crisp, about 3 minutes.
3. Drain chicken, reserving marinade. Add chicken to the skillet (or wok), increase heat, and stir-fry until browned, about 5 minutes.
4. In a bowl, combine reserved marinade with remaining 3 tablespoons sherry, soy sauce, water, cornstarch, sugar, and vinegar. Stir to dissolve cornstarch.
5. Pour the mixture over chicken mixture and cook, stirring constantly, until mixture thickens. Serve garnished with scallions.
